TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang P'anoh ga niya mki sku Byori Keng atu Sitan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 48 buwan, 155 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 95% kyan ku 147 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 5% kyan ku 8 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 83%, saySiyat 8%, Amis 1%, Paywan 1%, Bunun 1%, Setik 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na P'anoh hya ga llyung. tay 'zil na P'anoh hya ga llyung. tay mkyahu na P'anoh hya ga rgyax krahu. tay mkraya na P'anoh hya ga llyung. tay 'llaw na P'anoh hya ga Sinpitu. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ pʔanoħ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku βjori keŋ atu s~ɕitan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, s~ɕajs~ɕijat *%, amis~ɕ *%, pajwan *%, βunun *%, s~ɕetik *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran ru kjokaj. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na pʔanoħ ħja ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na pʔanoħ ħja ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħu na pʔanoħ ħja ɣa rɣjax kraħu. taj mkraja na pʔanoħ ħja ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔllaw na pʔanoħ ħja ɣa s~ɕinpitu. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang P'anoh ga niya mki sku Byori Keng atu Sitan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 48 buwan, 155 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 95% kyan ku 147 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 5% kyan ku 8 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 83%, saySiyat 8%, Amis 1%, Paywan 1%, Bunun 1%, Setik 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na P'anoh hya ga llyung. tay 'zil na P'anoh hya ga llyung. tay mkyahu na P'anoh hya ga rgyax krahu. tay mkraya na P'anoh hya ga llyung. tay 'llaw na P'anoh hya ga Sinpitu. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ pʔanoħ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku βjori keŋ atu s~ɕitan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, s~ɕajs~ɕijat *%, amis~ɕ *%, pajwan *%, βunun *%, s~ɕetik *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran ru kjokaj. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na pʔanoħ ħja ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na pʔanoħ ħja ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħu na pʔanoħ ħja ɣa rɣjax kraħu. taj mkraja na pʔanoħ ħja ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔllaw na pʔanoħ ħja ɣa s~ɕinpitu. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
